rationale: Educ. Code §11.155 governs school district eminent domain authority and condemnation proceedings. It has no relation to residence homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 11.155. EMINENT DOMAIN. (a) An independent school district may, by the exercise of the right of eminent domain, acquire the fee simple title to real property on which to construct school buildings or for any other public use necessary for the district.
_note: No conflict. The rule_text addresses eminent domain, not homestead exemptions.
